factors.summary: Cintas is experiencing organic revenue growth, with a 7.7% increase in the three months ended November 30, 2017 compared to the same period in 2016.

evidence.text: Revenue increased organically by 7.7% as a result of increased sales volume.
evidence.subsection: Three Months Ended November 30, 2017 Compared to Three Months Ended November 30, 2016

factors.summary: Demand trends are accelerating, supported by increased sales volume and customer activity.

evidence.text: Revenue increased organically by 7.7% as a result of increased sales volume. Growth was driven by many factors including new business sold by sales representatives, penetration of additional products and services into existing customers and strong customer retention.
evidence.subsection: Three Months Ended November 30, 2017 Compared to Three Months Ended November 30, 2016

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting towards lower-margin segments due to the G&K acquisition, which has lower margins than legacy Cintas margins.

evidence.text: The decrease was driven by the recent G&K acquisition, which has lower margins than our legacy Cintas margins.

factors.summary: Gross margins are stable, but operating margins are under pressure due to increased selling and administrative expenses and integration costs.

evidence.text: The reportable operating segment’s gross margin was $584.1 million , or 44.7% of revenue. The gross margin was 20 basis points lower than the prior fiscal year’s second quarter gross margin of 44.9%. The decrease was driven by the recent G&K acquisition, which has lower margins than our legacy Cintas margins.

factors.summary: Unit volumes are growing, driven by increased sales volume across all segments.

evidence.text: Revenue increased organically by 7.7% as a result of increased sales volume. Growth was driven by many factors including new business sold by sales representatives, penetration of additional products and services into existing customers and strong customer retention.
evidence.subsection: Three Months Ended November 30, 2017 Compared to Three Months Ended November 30, 2016
